message:
fix(lab): handle unknown destination node in DistributedHarness and fix oracle lint

harness.rs: send_message previously panicked with an index-out-of-bounds
when the destination node ID had no entry in node_to_host. Now unknown
destinations are handled gracefully — SpawnRequest messages get a
synthesised NodeUnreachable error result sent back to the caller; other
message types are silently dropped with a debug log.

oracle/mod.rs: renames unused _details binding to details and switches
from crate::tracing_compat::info! to tracing::info! (clippy lint fix).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
